name: Backyard Cherry
notes:
# Backyard Cherry Plan

- Bed: **South Raised Bed**
- Support: vertical twine
- Companion: basil + marigold

## Weekly Checklist
- [x] Mulched
- [ ] Prune lower suckers
- [ ] Rotate liquid feed

> Keep top growth airy to reduce mildew pressure after rain.

name: Kitchen Basil
notes:
# Kitchen Basil

## Light + Water
- Window: east-facing
- Water rhythm: every `2-3` days

## Pinch Strategy
1. Remove top pair above node 3
2. Keep side shoots active
3. Harvest often to prevent bolting

`Target`: dense, compact growth for weekly pesto harvests.

name: Front Lavender
notes:
# Front Lavender Border

## Garden Goals
- Pollinator support through summer
- Keep mound shape symmetrical

### Seasonal Tasks
- Spring: light shaping cut
- Mid-summer: deadhead spent spikes
- Fall: avoid hard prune

> Better too dry than too wet for root health.

name: Patio Mint
notes:
# Patio Mint Container

- Pot size: 12-inch
- Soil: moisture-retentive mix
- Position: morning sun

## Control Plan
- [x] Root barrier (container only)
- [ ] Cut runners monthly
- [ ] Refresh topsoil after heavy flush

Great for tea blends and garnish harvests.

name: Pepper Row A
notes:
# Pepper Row A

## Planting Layout
| Row | Spacing | Variety |
| --- | --- | --- |
| A1-A4 | 16 in | Sweet bell |

## Care Notes
- Stake each plant at transplant
- Remove first flower for stronger branching
- Feed with low-nitrogen bloom mix

name: Herb Corner
notes:
# Herb Corner Mix

Purple basil anchor for companion planting.

## Pairings
- Tomatoes
- Peppers
- Nasturtium edge

## Observations
- Aroma strongest after noon heat
- Aphid pressure low this season
- Prune before flowering for flavor

name: Rose Trellis
notes:
# Rose Trellis

## Structure
- Trellis tie points every 10 in
- Main canes trained horizontally

## Monthly Routine
1. Inspect ties and loosen if tight
2. Remove crossing stems
3. Feed after first flush

> Horizontal canes push more side flowering shoots.

name: Tomato Row B
notes:
# Tomato Row B

Backup crop line for later harvest window.

## Training
- Single-leader string trellis
- Remove leaves below first truss

## Disease Watch
- [ ] Check for early blight spots
- [ ] Keep drip emitters unclogged
- [ ] Increase airflow after storms

name: Window Basil 2
notes:
# Window Basil Backup

Secondary indoor basil for kitchen overflow.

## Rotation
- Turn pot `90deg` every 2 days
- Top-water lightly, then drain

## Harvest Rule
Take no more than one-third of canopy per trim cycle.

name: Lavender Border
notes:
# Hidcote Lavender Edge

Dense walkway edging with compact habit.

## Maintenance
- Light gravel mulch for drainage
- Deadhead to extend bloom
- Shear by one-third after flowering

### Fragrance Note
Best scent release in warm late afternoon sun.
